parts.text: {"issue_number": 105, "title": "Database connection timeout during startup", "body": "Getting database connection timeout on start.", "owner": "google", "repo": "adk-samples"}
{"issue_number": 106, "title": "The application crashed", "body": "It crashed on my machine. Please fix.", "owner": "google", "repo": "adk-samples"}

{"issue_number": 107, "title": "Severe SQL injection vulnerability in connection handler", "body": "I found a SQL injection in app/database.py line 24. Here is the query: Select * from users where id = '+ id +'. Anyone can access the whole database. Steps to reproduce: 1. Send ID payload. 2. Verify all users fetched. Expected: Use parameterized query.", "owner": "google", "repo": "adk-samples"}
